use_case: Sierra to transform customer engagement with AI | Sierra
workflow_before: Customer Care officers handled customer queries and transactions manually
workflow_after: AI agents handle simple customer requests independently, allowing human agents to focus on complex cases
delivery_model: AI agents deployed across chat and voice channels
team_composition: AI agents support customer service teams with human oversight
reported_need: More personalised experiences, greater convenience and faster, more responsive service
reported_delivery_components: Mr Ng Tian Chong, Chief Executive Officer, Singtel Singapore, said: “Putting our customers first has always been at the heart of what we do. The deployment of agentic AI across chat and voice is about delivering real value — more personalised experiences, greater convenience and faster, more responsive service. By using AI to support our customer service teams, we can ensure customers are promptly and well assisted, while empowering our agents to focus on more complex cases where human expertise matters most. Our AI agents are designed to understand local expressions and even Singlish, reflecting our roots as a homegrown company serving a diverse nation. This marks an important step in redefining how we build and sustain customer relationships in the AI era.”
